---
title: "SCENIC+ Analysis - All Configs"
format: html
params:
  working_dir: "/ra-arco-hvc-nc_seurat-snrna-clustering"
  out_dir_base: "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/scenicplus/motor-pathway_scenicplus_v2_cluster-snrna-cr_all"
---
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(scCustomize)
library(ArchR)
library(tidyverse)
library(qs)
library(cowplot)
library(viridis)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(rhdf5)
library(hdf5r)
library(anndata)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(proxy)
select = dplyr::select

source("/home/brad/nest/rstudio/utils/stats.R")
```

```{r}
scplus_dir = '/hdd/jupyter/brad/scenicplus/motor-pathway_multiome/motor-pathway_multiome_seurat_cellbender.0.05_preprocess_cr/'
working_dir = params$working_dir

## Discover all config directories
scenicplus_path = file.path(scplus_dir, working_dir, "scenicplus")
config_dirs = list.dirs(scenicplus_path, recursive = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
config_dirs = config_dirs[grepl("^config[0-9]+$", config_dirs)]
config_dirs = config_dirs[order(as.numeric(sub("config", "", config_dirs)))]
print(paste("Found configs:", paste(config_dirs, collapse = ", ")))

## Seurat object
analysis_prefix = "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/seurat/motor-pathway_multiome_seurat_cellbender.0.05_preprocess_cr/reduction_viz/"
in_dir_sub = "combined_all_umap"
in_dir = file.path(analysis_prefix, in_dir_sub)
obj_fname = file.path(in_dir, "obj_clustered.qs")

out_dir_base = params$out_dir_base
dir.create(out_dir_base, showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("working_dir:", working_dir, "\n")
cat("out_dir_base:", out_dir_base, "\n")
```

## Read Seurat object
```{r}
obj = qread(obj_fname)
```

## Average expression
```{r}
obj_avg = log1p(AggregateExpression(obj, group.by="cluster", assays = "SCT")[[1]])
```

## Load TFs
```{r}
tfs_df = readr::read_csv("/home/brad/nest/gene_lists/lambert_tfs/tfs.csv")
tfs_dbd = tfs_df %>% filter(DBD!="Unknown")
```

## DEG analysis (config-independent)
```{r}
pairs = list(ra = c("Glut-RA", "Glut-Arco-1"),
             gaba4 = c("GABA-4-1", "GABA-1-1"),
             astro = c("Astro-1", "Oligo"))

obj_agg = AggregateExpression(obj, assays="SCT", group.by = c("assignment", "cluster"), return.seurat = T)

deg = map(pairs, function(pair_cur) {
  deg = FindMarkers(obj_agg, ident.1 = pair_cur[1], ident.2=pair_cur[2], test.use = "DESeq2", assay="SCT",
                    group.by = "cluster", logfc.threshold = 0, min.pct = 0)
  deg = deg %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
  deg
}) %>% bind_rows(.id="set")

all_genes = rownames(obj)
all_genes_id = bitr(all_genes, "SYMBOL", "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
```

## Define helper functions
```{r}
convert_category_to_factor = function(x) {
  factor(x$codes, labels = x$categories, levels=0:(length(x$categories)-1))
}

extract_matrix = function(ereg_file, obs_name) {
  cur = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp(obs_name))
  rnames = cur[["var"]]$`_index`
  cnames = cur[["obs"]]$Cell
  mat = data.frame(t(cur[["X"]]))
  colnames(mat) = rnames
  rownames(mat) = cnames
  mat
}
```

## Plotting subfunctions
```{r}
#' Calculate mean AUC per cluster for each TF, scaled 0-1
#' @param gene_auc Data frame with gene AUC values and cluster column
#' @param ereg_pattern Regex pattern to filter eRegulon columns (e.g., "\\+\\/\\+")
#' @return Matrix with TFs as rows and clusters as columns, values scaled 0-1
calculate_gene_auc_mean = function(gene_auc, ereg_pattern) {
  gene_auc_cur = gene_auc %>% select(one_of("cluster"), matches(ereg_pattern))

  if (ncol(gene_auc_cur) <= 1) {
    cat("No regulons matching pattern:", ereg_pattern, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Clean column names
  pattern_clean = ifelse(grepl("\\+", ereg_pattern),
                         "_(direct|extended)_\\+\\/\\+_\\([0-9]+[a-z]\\)",
                         "_(direct|extended)_\\-\\/\\-_\\([0-9]+[a-z]\\)")
  colnames(gene_auc_cur) = sub(pattern_clean, "", colnames(gene_auc_cur))
  gene_auc_cur = gene_auc_cur %>% pivot_longer(-cluster, names_to="tf")

  gene_auc_cur_mean = gene_auc_cur %>%
    filter(!is.na(cluster)) %>%
    group_by(cluster, tf) %>%
    summarize(value_mean = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(tf) %>%
    mutate(value_mean_scale = scale_01(value_mean)) %>%
    pivot_wider(id_cols=!contains("value"), names_from="tf", values_from="value_mean_scale") %>%
    column_to_rownames("cluster") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    t()

  gene_auc_cur_mean
}

#' Calculate specificity score for each row of a matrix
#' Uses Jensen-Shannon divergence from uniform distribution
#' Higher values = more specific to certain clusters
#' @param mat Matrix with features as rows and clusters as columns (values should be non-negative)
#' @return Named vector of specificity scores
calculate_specificity = function(mat) {
  apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
    # Normalize to probability distribution
    x_norm = x / sum(x)
    # Uniform distribution
    n = length(x)
    uniform = rep(1/n, n)
    # Jensen-Shannon divergence
    m = (x_norm + uniform) / 2
    js_div = 0.5 * sum(x_norm * log2(x_norm / m), na.rm = TRUE) +
             0.5 * sum(uniform * log2(uniform / m), na.rm = TRUE)
    js_div
  })
}

#' Calculate specificity using Gini coefficient
#' Higher values = more unequal distribution across clusters
#' @param mat Matrix with features as rows and clusters as columns
#' @return Named vector of Gini coefficients
calculate_gini = function(mat) {
  apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
    n = length(x)
    x_sorted = sort(x)
    # Gini coefficient formula
    sum((2 * seq_len(n) - n - 1) * x_sorted) / (n * sum(x_sorted))
  })
}

#' Calculate TF specificity score for each cell type
#' For each TF-cluster pair, computes how much higher the TF activity is
#' in that cluster compared to all other clusters
#' @param mat Matrix with TFs as rows and clusters as columns (e.g., from calculate_gene_auc_mean)
#' @param method Method to calculate specificity: "zscore", "fold_change", or "diff"
#' @return Data frame with columns: tf, cluster, specificity, rank_in_cluster
calculate_celltype_specificity = function(mat, method = c("zscore", "fold_change", "diff")) {

  method = match.arg(method)


  results = map_dfr(rownames(mat), function(tf) {
    x = mat[tf, ]

    specificity = switch(method,
      zscore = {
        # Z-score: how many SDs above the mean
        (x - mean(x)) / sd(x)
      },
      fold_change = {
        # Fold change over mean of other clusters
        map_dbl(names(x), function(cluster) {
          others = x[names(x) != cluster]
          x[cluster] / mean(others)
        }) %>% set_names(names(x))
      },
      diff = {
        # Difference from mean of other clusters
        map_dbl(names(x), function(cluster) {
          others = x[names(x) != cluster]
          x[cluster] - mean(others)
        }) %>% set_names(names(x))
      }
    )

    data.frame(
      tf = tf,
      cluster = names(specificity),
      value = as.numeric(x),
      specificity = as.numeric(specificity)
    )
  })

  # Add rank within each cluster (which TFs are most specific to each cluster)
  results = results %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    mutate(rank_in_cluster = rank(-specificity, ties.method = "min")) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    # Add rank within each TF (which clusters is this TF most specific to)
    group_by(tf) %>%
    mutate(rank_in_tf = rank(-specificity, ties.method = "min")) %>%
    ungroup()

  results
}

#' Generate AUC heatmaps (positive or negative regulons)
plot_auc_heatmaps = function(gene_auc, obj_avg, ereg_pattern, out_dir, prefix, palette) {
  gene_auc_cur_mean = calculate_gene_auc_mean(gene_auc, ereg_pattern)

  if (is.null(gene_auc_cur_mean)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  expr_mat = obj_avg[intersect(rownames(gene_auc_cur_mean), rownames(obj_avg)),
                     intersect(colnames(gene_auc_cur_mean), colnames(obj_avg))]
  expr_mat = t(scale(t(expr_mat)))

  hc = hclust(dist(gene_auc_cur_mean), method="ward.D")

  # Gene AUC heatmap - no names
  height = 4
  width = 3
  mat = gene_auc_cur_mean
  colors = scales::brewer_pal(palette = palette, direction = 1)(9)
  cols = colorRamp2(breaks = seq(min(mat), max(mat), length.out=9), colors = colors)

  hm = Heatmap(gene_auc_cur_mean, cluster_columns = F, cluster_rows = hc,
               show_row_names = F, col = cols,
               height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))
  pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_gene_auc_heatmap_no-names.pdf")), height = height + 2, width = width + 2)
  print(hm)
  dev.off()

  # Gene AUC heatmap - with names
  height = 10
  width = height * ncol(mat) / nrow(mat)
  hm = Heatmap(gene_auc_cur_mean, cluster_columns = F, cluster_rows = hc,
               show_row_names = T, col = cols,
               row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6), column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
               height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))
  pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_gene_auc_heatmap_names.pdf")), height = height + 10, width = width + 10)
  print(hm)
  dev.off()

  # Expression heatmap
  height = 4
  width = 3
  mat = expr_mat
  cols_expr = colorRamp2(breaks = seq(min(mat), max(mat), length.out=9),
                         colors = scales::brewer_pal(palette = "PuOr", direction = -1)(9))
  hm = Heatmap(mat, cluster_columns = F, cluster_rows = hc,
               show_row_names = F, col = cols_expr,
               height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))
  pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_expr_heatmap_no-names.pdf")), height = height + 2, width = width + 2)
  print(hm)
  dev.off()

  height = 10
  width = 3
  hm = Heatmap(mat, cluster_columns = F, cluster_rows = hc,
               show_row_names = T, col = cols_expr, row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
               height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))
  pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_expr_heatmap_names.pdf")), height = height + 2, width = width + 2)
  print(hm)
  dev.off()

  return(list(gene_auc_cur_mean = gene_auc_cur_mean, expr_mat = expr_mat, hc = hc))
}
```

```{r}
#' Plot TF UMAPs
plot_tf_umaps = function(obj, tfs_to_plot, umap_dir, reduction_cur = "dims30nn30mindist0.3") {
  dir.create(umap_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  DefaultAssay(obj) = "SCT"

  for (tp in tfs_to_plot) {
    tryCatch({
      gg = FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj, features = tp, figure_plot = T,
                                aspect_ratio = 1, reduction = reduction_cur,
                                raster = T, raster.dpi=c(1024,1024),
                                pt.size = 2, alpha_exp = 1, alpha_na_exp = .1)
      save_plot(file.path(umap_dir, str_interp("${tp}.pdf")), gg, base_width=7, base_asp = 1)

      gg = Nebulosa::plot_density(obj, features = tp, size = .1, reduction = reduction_cur) +
        coord_equal()
      save_plot(file.path(umap_dir, str_interp("${tp}_density.pdf")), gg, base_width=7, base_asp = 1)
    }, error = function(e) cat("Error plotting", tp, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n"))
  }
}
```

```{r}
#' Plot UMAPs for selected eRegulons
plot_eregulon_umaps = function(obj, ereg_sane, ereg_select, umap_dir, nplot = 10,
                                reduction_cur = "dims30nn30mindist0.3") {
  DefaultAssay(obj) = "SCT"

  for (ereg_select_cur in ereg_select) {
    ereg_sane_cur = ereg_sane %>% filter(eRegulon_name == ereg_select_cur) %>%
      distinct(Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
      arrange(desc(importance_TF2G))

    if (nrow(ereg_sane_cur) > 0) {
      to_plot = ereg_sane_cur$Gene[1:min(nplot, nrow(ereg_sane_cur))]
      umap_dir_cur = file.path(umap_dir, sub("/", ":", ereg_select_cur))
      dir.create(umap_dir_cur, showWarnings = FALSE)

      for (tp in to_plot) {
        tryCatch({
          gg = FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj, features = tp, figure_plot = T,
                                    aspect_ratio = 1, reduction = reduction_cur,
                                    raster = T, raster.dpi=c(1024,1024),
                                    pt.size = 2, alpha_exp = 1, alpha_na_exp = .1)
          save_plot(file.path(umap_dir_cur, str_interp("${tp}.pdf")), gg, base_width=7, base_asp = 1)

          gg = Nebulosa::plot_density(obj, features = tp, size = .1, reduction = reduction_cur) +
            coord_equal()
          save_plot(file.path(umap_dir_cur, str_interp("${tp}_density.pdf")), gg, base_width=7, base_asp = 1)
        }, error = function(e) cat("Error plotting", tp, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n"))
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#' Generate dot plots for eRegulons
plot_eregulon_dotplots = function(obj, ereg_sane, ereg_select, dot_dir, labels_order, nplot = 20) {
  dir.create(dot_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  obj$cluster = factor(obj$cluster, levels=labels_order)
  DefaultAssay(obj) = "SCT"

  for (ereg_select_cur in ereg_select) {
    ereg_select_cur_form = sub("/", ":", ereg_select_cur)
    ereg_sane_cur = ereg_sane %>% filter(eRegulon_name == ereg_select_cur) %>%
      distinct(Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
      arrange(desc(importance_x_rho_TF2G))

    if (nrow(ereg_sane_cur) > 0) {
      to_plot = ereg_sane_cur$Gene[1:min(nplot, nrow(ereg_sane_cur))]
      to_plot = intersect(to_plot, rownames(obj))
      if (length(to_plot) > 0) {
        gg = DotPlot_scCustom(obj, features=to_plot, group.by = "cluster", flip_axes = T, x_lab_rotate = T)
        save_plot(file.path(dot_dir, str_interp("${ereg_select_cur_form}.pdf")), gg,
                  base_height = 3 * length(to_plot)/10, base_width = 10)
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#' Plot differential expression of TF target genes
plot_tf_target_deg = function(ereg, obj_avg, deg, tf_pattern, tf_name, out_dir,
                              clusters_expr, sets_deg, color_limit=NULL) {

  ereg_cur = ereg %>% filter(grepl(tf_pattern, eRegulon_name))
  features_cur = unique(ereg_cur$Gene)

  if (length(features_cur) == 0) {
    cat("No target genes found for", tf_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Expression heatmap across clusters
  features_in_avg = intersect(features_cur, rownames(obj_avg))
  clusters_in_avg = intersect(clusters_expr, colnames(obj_avg))

  if (length(features_in_avg) > 0 && length(clusters_in_avg) > 0) {
    mat = obj_avg[features_in_avg, clusters_in_avg, drop=FALSE]
    cnames = colnames(mat)
    mat_var = apply(mat, 1, var)
    mat = mat[mat_var > 0, , drop=FALSE]

    if (nrow(mat) > 1) {
      mat = t(apply(mat, 1, scale))
      colnames(mat) = cnames

      hclust_methods = c("average", "ward.D", "ward.D2", "complete", "mcquitty", "median", "centroid")
      dist_methods = c("euclidean", "correlation")

      walk(hclust_methods, function(hclust_method) {
        walk(dist_methods, function(dist_method) {
          tryCatch({
            hc = hclust(dist(mat, method = dist_method), method=hclust_method)

            cols = colorRamp2(breaks = seq(min(mat), max(mat), length.out=9),
                              colors = scales::brewer_pal(palette = "PuOr", direction = -1)(9))

            height = max(4, nrow(mat) * 0.1)
            width = max(3, ncol(mat) * 0.3)
            hm = Heatmap(mat, cluster_rows = hc, cluster_columns = FALSE, col=cols,
                         row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
                         height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))

            pdf(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("${tf_name}_target_expr_heatmap_${dist_method}_${hclust_method}.pdf")),
                height = height + 2, width = width + 2)
            print(hm)
            dev.off()
          }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Skipping expr heatmap for", tf_name, dist_method, hclust_method, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
          })
        })
      })
    }
  }

  # DEG heatmap
  deg_w = deg %>%
    filter(set %in% sets_deg) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = -c(p_val, pct.1, pct.2, p_val_adj),
      names_from = "set",
      values_from = "avg_log2FC"
    ) %>%
    column_to_rownames("gene")

  features_in_deg = intersect(features_cur, rownames(deg_w))

  if (length(features_in_deg) > 1) {
    mat = deg_w[features_in_deg, sets_deg, drop=FALSE]
    mat = mat[complete.cases(mat), , drop=FALSE]

    if (nrow(mat) > 1) {
      hclust_methods = c("average", "ward.D", "ward.D2", "complete", "mcquitty", "median", "centroid")
      dist_methods = c("euclidean", "correlation")

      walk(hclust_methods, function(hclust_method) {
        walk(dist_methods, function(dist_method) {
          tryCatch({
            hc = hclust(dist(mat, method=dist_method), method=hclust_method)

            if (is.null(color_limit)) {
              limit_val = max(abs(min(mat)), max(mat))
            } else {
              limit_val = color_limit
            }

            cols = colorRamp2(breaks = c(-limit_val, 0, limit_val),
                              colors = scales::brewer_pal(palette = "PuOr", direction = -1)(3))

            scale_factor = 0.05
            width = max(1, length(sets_deg) * 0.5)
            height = nrow(mat) * scale_factor

            hm = Heatmap(mat, cluster_rows = hc, cluster_columns = FALSE, col=cols,
                         row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
                         width = unit(width, "in"),
                         height = unit(height, "in"))

            pdf(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("${tf_name}_target_deg_heatmap_${dist_method}_${hclust_method}.pdf")),
                height = height + 2, width = width + 2)
            print(hm)
            dev.off()
          }, error = function(e) {
            cat("Skipping DEG heatmap for", tf_name, dist_method, hclust_method, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
          })
        })
      })
    }
  }


  return(list(features = features_cur, ereg = ereg_cur))
}

plot_deg_scatter <- function(ereg, deg, tf_pattern, tf_name, out_dir,
                             sets_deg) {

  ereg_cur = ereg %>% filter(grepl(tf_pattern, eRegulon_name))
  features_cur = unique(ereg_cur$Gene)

  if (length(features_cur) == 0) {
    cat("No target genes found for", tf_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  deg_w = deg %>%
    filter(set %in% sets_deg) %>%
    filter(gene %in% features_cur) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = -c(p_val, pct.1, pct.2, p_val_adj),
      names_from = "set",
      values_from = "avg_log2FC"
    )

  deg_w = deg_w %>% left_join(ereg_cur %>% rename(gene = Gene))

  y_vals = deg_w[[sets_deg[2]]]
  y_min = min(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_max = max(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  ## Plot scatter of DEGs
  x_vals = deg_w[[sets_deg[1]]]
  x_min = min(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max = max(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  # Calculate Pearson correlation
  cor_val = cor(x_vals, y_vals, use = "complete.obs")
  cor_label = sprintf("r = %.2f", cor_val)

  colors_to_plot = c("importance_TF2G", "importance_log_TF2G", "importance_x_rho_TF2G", "importance_x_rho_log_TF2G")
  walk(colors_to_plot, function(color_to_plot) {
    gg = ggplot(deg_w, aes(.data[[sets_deg[1]]], .data[[sets_deg[2]]])) +
      geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=1, linewidth=0.3) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=1, linewidth=0.3) +
      geom_point(aes(color = .data[[color_to_plot]]), size=0.5) +
      annotate("text", x = x_min, y = y_max, label = cor_label,
               hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 2) +
      scale_color_viridis() +
      lims(y = c(y_min, y_max)) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(0.15, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 4),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "pt")
      )
    print(gg)

    save_plot(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("${tf_name}_target_deg_scatter_${color_to_plot}.pdf")), gg,
              base_height = 2, base_width = 3)
  })
}

plot_deg_density <- function(ereg, deg, tf_pattern, tf_name, out_dir, sets_deg) {
  ereg_cur = ereg %>% filter(grepl(tf_pattern, eRegulon_name))
  features_cur = unique(ereg_cur$Gene)

  if (length(features_cur) == 0) {
    cat("No target genes found for", tf_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Pivot DEG data to wide format with sets_deg columns
  deg_w = deg %>%
    filter(set %in% sets_deg) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = gene,
      names_from = "set",
      values_from = "avg_log2FC"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[sets_deg[1]]]) & !is.na(.data[[sets_deg[2]]]))

  deg_all = deg_w %>% mutate(group = "all genes") %>%
    mutate(column_prod = abs(.data[[sets_deg[1]]] * .data[[sets_deg[2]]])) %>%
    filter(column_prod > .1)

  deg_ereg = deg_w %>%
    filter(gene %in% features_cur) %>%
    left_join(ereg_cur %>% rename(gene = Gene), by = "gene") %>%
    mutate(group = tf_name)

  # Create grey color palette for filled density
  n_bins = 8
  grey_colors = colorRampPalette(c("white", "grey20"))(n_bins)

  colors_to_plot = c("importance_TF2G", "importance_log_TF2G", "importance_x_rho_TF2G", "importance_x_rho_log_TF2G")
  walk(colors_to_plot, function(color_to_plot) {
    gg = ggplot() +
      geom_density_2d_filled(data = deg_all,
                             aes(.data[[sets_deg[1]]], .data[[sets_deg[2]]]),
                             bins = n_bins) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = grey_colors, guide = "none") +
      geom_point(data = deg_ereg,
                 aes(.data[[sets_deg[1]]], .data[[sets_deg[2]]], color = .data[[color_to_plot]]),
                 size = 0.1, alpha = 0.6) +
      scale_color_viridis() +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
      labs(x = sets_deg[1], y = sets_deg[2]) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
      theme(
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(0.15, "cm"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 4),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "pt"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
    print(gg)

    save_plot(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("${tf_name}_deg_density2d_${color_to_plot}.pdf")), gg,
              base_height = 2, base_width = 3)
  })

  # Separate plot with filled 2d density for eRegulon genes (no points)
  blue_colors = colorRampPalette(c("white", "steelblue"))(n_bins)

  gg_density = ggplot() +
    geom_density_2d_filled(data = deg_all,
                           aes(.data[[sets_deg[1]]], .data[[sets_deg[2]]]),
                           bins = n_bins) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = grey_colors, guide = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_density_2d_filled(data = deg_ereg,
                           aes(.data[[sets_deg[1]]], .data[[sets_deg[2]]]),
                           bins = n_bins, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = blue_colors, guide = "none") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    labs(x = sets_deg[1], y = sets_deg[2]) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "pt"),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  print(gg_density)

  save_plot(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("${tf_name}_deg_density2d_filled.pdf")), gg_density,
            base_height = 2, base_width = 2)
}

#' Permutation test for eRegulon gene distribution
#' Tests whether eRegulon genes have a different DE distribution than expected by chance
permutation_test_deg <- function(ereg, deg, tf_pattern, tf_name, sets_deg,
                                  n_perm = 1000, stat_fn = c("correlation", "mean_product")) {
  stat_fn = match.arg(stat_fn)

  ereg_cur = ereg %>% filter(grepl(tf_pattern, eRegulon_name))
  features_cur = unique(ereg_cur$Gene)
  n_features = length(features_cur)

  if (n_features == 0) {
    cat("No target genes found for", tf_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Pivot DEG data to wide format
  deg_w = deg %>%
    filter(set %in% sets_deg) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = gene,
      names_from = "set",
      values_from = "avg_log2FC"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[sets_deg[1]]]) & !is.na(.data[[sets_deg[2]]]))

  all_genes = deg_w$gene
  x_all = deg_w[[sets_deg[1]]]
  y_all = deg_w[[sets_deg[2]]]

  # Calculate observed statistic
  deg_ereg = deg_w %>% filter(gene %in% features_cur)
  x_obs = deg_ereg[[sets_deg[1]]]
  y_obs = deg_ereg[[sets_deg[2]]]

  if (stat_fn == "correlation") {
    obs_stat = cor(x_obs, y_obs, use = "complete.obs")
  } else {
    obs_stat = mean(x_obs * y_obs, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  # Permutation test - sample random genes of same size
  set.seed(42)
  perm_stats = map_dbl(1:n_perm, function(i) {
    idx = sample(1:nrow(deg_w), n_features, replace = FALSE)
    x_perm = x_all[idx]
    y_perm = y_all[idx]

    if (stat_fn == "correlation") {
      cor(x_perm, y_perm, use = "complete.obs")
    } else {
      mean(x_perm * y_perm, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  })

  # Calculate p-value (two-tailed)
  p_val = mean(abs(perm_stats) >= abs(obs_stat))

  cat(sprintf("%s: observed %s = %.3f, p-value = %.4f (n_genes = %d, n_perm = %d)\n",
              tf_name, stat_fn, obs_stat, p_val, n_features, n_perm))

  list(
    tf_name = tf_name,
    stat_fn = stat_fn,
    obs_stat = obs_stat,
    perm_stats = perm_stats,
    p_val = p_val,
    n_features = n_features
  )
}
```

```{r}
#' Run GO analysis for eRegulons
run_go_analysis = function(ereg_sane, all_genes_id, out_dir) {
  tfs = unique(ereg_sane$TF)
  go_fname = file.path(out_dir, "gos.rds")

  gos = map(tfs, function(tf) {
    ereg_sane_cur = ereg_sane %>% filter(TF == tf)
    regs = unique(ereg_sane_cur$regulation)

    go_cur = map(regs, function(reg) {
      ereg_sane_cur1 = ereg_sane_cur %>% filter(regulation==reg)
      sel_genes = unique(ereg_sane_cur1$Gene)
      sel_genes_id = bitr(sel_genes, "SYMBOL", "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

      if (nrow(sel_genes_id) > 0) {
        go = enrichGO(gene = sel_genes_id$ENTREZID,
                      universe = all_genes_id$ENTREZID,
                      OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                      ont = "ALL",
                      maxGSSize = 200,
                      readable = TRUE)
        return(go)
      }
      return(NULL)
    }) %>% set_names(regs)
  }) %>% set_names(tfs)

  saveRDS(gos, go_fname)

  go_df = map(gos, function(go1) {
    map(go1, function(x) if(!is.null(x)) as.data.frame(x) else NULL) %>%
      compact() %>%
      bind_rows(.id = "sign")
  }) %>% bind_rows(.id="pair")

  return(list(gos = gos, go_df = go_df))
}
```

```{r}
#' Export eRegulon data
export_eregulon_data = function(ereg_sane, ereg_tf, ereg_tftf, out_dir) {
  # TF networks export
  ereg_sane_out = ereg_sane %>%
    distinct(TF, Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
    select(TF, Gene, regulation, contains("importance"), contains("rho"))
  write_delim(ereg_sane_out, file.path(out_dir, "scenicplus_sane.txt"), delim="\t")

  ereg_tf_out = ereg_tf %>%
    distinct(TF, Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
    select(TF, Gene, regulation, contains("importance"), contains("rho"))
  write_delim(ereg_tf_out, file.path(out_dir, "scenicplus_tf-tf.txt"), delim="\t")

  ereg_tftf_out = ereg_tftf %>%
    distinct(TF, Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
    select(TF, Gene, regulation, contains("importance"), contains("rho"))
  write_delim(ereg_tftf_out, file.path(out_dir, "scenicplus_tf-tf-only.txt"), delim="\t")

  # Export for Cytoscape
  write_delim(ereg_sane %>% select(-is_extended),
              file.path(out_dir, "scenicplus_eRegulons.txt"), delim="\t")

  ereg_sane_un = ereg_sane %>%
    distinct(TF, Gene, .keep_all=T) %>%
    select(-is_extended)
  write_delim(ereg_sane_un, file.path(out_dir, "scenicplus_eRegulons_unique-gene.txt"), delim="\t")
}
```

## Process single config function
```{r}
process_config = function(config_name, scplus_dir, working_dir, out_dir_base,
                          obj, obj_avg, tfs_dbd, deg, all_genes_id, deg_color_limit=NULL) {

  cat("\n\n========================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", config_name, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n\n")

  ## Set up paths for this config
  ereg_file = file.path(scplus_dir, working_dir, "scenicplus", config_name, "outs", "scplusmdata.h5mu")

  ## Check if file exists
  if (!file.exists(ereg_file)) {
    cat("Skipping", config_name, "- file not found:", ereg_file, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  out_dir = file.path(out_dir_base, config_name)
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  ## Extract data
  cis_types = c("direct", "extended")

  ereg = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    ereg_cur = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/uns/${cis_type}_e_regulon_metadata")) %>%
      do.call(cbind.data.frame, .)
  }) %>% bind_rows() %>% mutate(class = "Glut")

  gene_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    extract_matrix(ereg_file, str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_gene_based_AUC"))
  }) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

  region_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    extract_matrix(ereg_file, str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_region_based_AUC"))
  }) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

  group_set = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/mod/scRNA_counts/obs"))
  group_set = group_set[c("_index", "cluster")]
  factor_ind = which(map_lgl(group_set, ~length(.x)==2))

  for (fi in factor_ind) {
    group_set[[fi]] = convert_category_to_factor(group_set[[fi]])
  }
  group_df = cbind.data.frame(group_set)

  labels_order = levels(group_df$cluster)
  labels_order = c(sort(grep("HVC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("NC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Nido", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("RA", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Arco", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Glut-Pre", labels_order, value=T), decreasing = T),
                   sort(grep("GABA", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("GABA-Pre", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Astro", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Epen", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Oligo", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("OPC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Micro", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Endo", labels_order, value=T)))
  labels_order = unique(labels_order)

  group_df = group_df %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels=labels_order))

  gene_auc = gene_auc %>% left_join(group_df)
  region_auc = region_auc %>% left_join(group_df)

  gene_auc = gene_auc %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))
  region_auc = region_auc %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))

  ereg = ereg %>%
    mutate(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * abs(rho_TF2G),
           importance_x_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * rho_TF2G) %>%
    mutate(importance_x_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_rho_TF2G),
           importance_x_abs_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G),
           importance_log_TF2G = log(importance_TF2G))

  ## Filter eRegulons
  ereg_sane = ereg %>%
    filter(grepl("\\+\\/\\+", eRegulon_name) | grepl("-\\/-", eRegulon_name))
  ereg_tf = ereg_sane %>%
    filter(Gene %in% tfs_dbd$Name)
  ereg_tftf = ereg_sane %>% filter(Gene %in% .$TF)

  ## Heatmaps
  cat("Generating heatmaps...\n")
  plot_auc_heatmaps(gene_auc, obj_avg, "\\+\\/\\+", out_dir, "positive", "Greys")
  plot_auc_heatmaps(gene_auc, obj_avg, "\\-\\/\\-", out_dir, "negative", "BuGn")

  ## UMAP plots (eRegulon targets only - TF UMAPs generated outside loop)
  cat("Generating eRegulon UMAP plots...\n")
  umap_dir = file.path(out_dir, "umaps")
  dir.create(umap_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  ereg_select = c("MAFB_extended_+/+", "EMX2_direct_+/+")
  plot_eregulon_umaps(obj, ereg_sane, ereg_select, umap_dir, nplot = 10)

  ## Dot plots
  cat("Generating dot plots...\n")
  dot_dir = file.path(out_dir, "dotplots")
  plot_eregulon_dotplots(obj, ereg_sane, ereg_select, dot_dir, labels_order, nplot = 20)

  ## TF target gene differential expression plots
  cat("Generating TF target DEG plots...\n")
  tf_deg_dir = file.path(out_dir, "tf_target_deg")
  dir.create(tf_deg_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # MAFB
  plot_tf_target_deg(
    ereg = ereg,
    obj_avg = obj_avg,
    deg = deg,
    tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
    tf_name = "MAFB",
    out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
    clusters_expr = c("Glut-RA", "Glut-Arco-1", "Glut-Arco-2", "GABA-2-1", "GABA-3", "GABA-4-1", "GABA-1-1"),
    sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"),
    color_limit = deg_color_limit
  )

  # EMX2
  plot_tf_target_deg(
    ereg = ereg,
    obj_avg = obj_avg,
    deg = deg,
    tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
    tf_name = "EMX2",
    out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
    clusters_expr = grep("RA|Arco|Astro|Oligo", colnames(obj_avg), value = TRUE),
    sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"),
    color_limit = deg_color_limit
  )

  ## DEG scatter plots
  cat("Generating DEG scatter plots...\n")
  plot_deg_scatter(ereg, deg = deg, tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                   tf_name = "MAFB", out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"))
  plot_deg_scatter(ereg, deg = deg, tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                   tf_name = "EMX2", out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"))

  ## DEG density plots
  cat("Generating DEG density plots...\n")
  plot_deg_density(ereg, deg = deg, tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                   tf_name = "MAFB", out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"))
  plot_deg_density(ereg, deg = deg, tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                   tf_name = "EMX2", out_dir = tf_deg_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"))

  ## Permutation tests
  cat("Running permutation tests...\n")
  perm_results = list()
  perm_results[["MAFB"]] = permutation_test_deg(
    ereg, deg, tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
    tf_name = "MAFB", sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"),
    stat_fn = "mean_product", n_perm = 1E4)
  perm_results[["EMX2"]] = permutation_test_deg(
    ereg, deg, tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
    tf_name = "EMX2", sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"),
    stat_fn = "mean_product", n_perm = 1E4)

  perm_summary = bind_rows(lapply(perm_results, function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(NULL)
    data.frame(tf = x$tf_name, stat_fn = x$stat_fn, obs_stat = x$obs_stat,
               p_val = x$p_val, n_features = x$n_features)
  }))
  write_delim(perm_summary, file.path(out_dir, "permutation_test_results.txt"), delim = "\t")

  ## GO analysis
  #cat("Running GO analysis...\n")
  #go_results = run_go_analysis(ereg_sane, all_genes_id, out_dir)

  ## Export data
  cat("Exporting data...\n")
  export_eregulon_data(ereg_sane, ereg_tf, ereg_tftf, out_dir)

  cat("\nCompleted processing:", config_name, "\n")
  return(list(ereg = ereg, ereg_sane = ereg_sane, perm_results = perm_results))
}
```

## Load single config for testing
```{r}
#' Load data from a single config for interactive testing of plotting functions
#' Set test_mode = TRUE to load just one config's data without running full analysis
test_mode = FALSE
test_config = "config11"  # Change this to test different configs

load_single_config <- function(config_name, scplus_dir, working_dir, obj, tfs_dbd) {
  ereg_file = file.path(scplus_dir, working_dir, "scenicplus", config_name, "outs", "scplusmdata.h5mu")

  if (!file.exists(ereg_file)) {
    stop("File not found: ", ereg_file)
  }

  cis_types = c("direct", "extended")

  ereg = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    ereg_cur = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/uns/${cis_type}_e_regulon_metadata")) %>%
      do.call(cbind.data.frame, .)
  }) %>% bind_rows() %>% mutate(class = "Glut")

  gene_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    extract_matrix(ereg_file, str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_gene_based_AUC"))
  }) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

  region_auc = map(cis_types, \(cis_type) {
    extract_matrix(ereg_file, str_interp("/mod/${cis_type}_region_based_AUC"))
  }) %>% bind_cols() %>% rownames_to_column("_index")

  group_set = rhdf5::h5read(ereg_file, name = str_interp("/mod/scRNA_counts/obs"))
  group_set = group_set[c("_index", "cluster")]
  factor_ind = which(map_lgl(group_set, ~length(.x)==2))
  for (fi in factor_ind) {
    group_set[[fi]] = convert_category_to_factor(group_set[[fi]])
  }
  group_df = cbind.data.frame(group_set)

  labels_order = levels(group_df$cluster)
  labels_order = c(sort(grep("HVC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("NC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Nido", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("RA", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Arco", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Glut-Pre", labels_order, value=T), decreasing = T),
                   sort(grep("GABA", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("GABA-Pre", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Astro", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Epen", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Oligo", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("OPC", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Micro", labels_order, value=T)),
                   sort(grep("Endo", labels_order, value=T)))
  labels_order = unique(labels_order)

  group_df = group_df %>% mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels=labels_order))

  gene_auc = gene_auc %>% left_join(group_df) %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))
  region_auc = region_auc %>% left_join(group_df) %>% filter(!is.na(cluster))

  ereg = ereg %>%
    mutate(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * abs(rho_TF2G),
           importance_x_rho_TF2G = importance_TF2G * rho_TF2G) %>%
    mutate(importance_x_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_rho_TF2G),
           importance_x_abs_rho_log_TF2G = log(importance_x_abs_rho_TF2G),
           importance_log_TF2G = log(importance_TF2G))

  ereg_sane = ereg %>%
    filter(grepl("\\+\\/\\+", eRegulon_name) | grepl("-\\/-", eRegulon_name))
  ereg_tf = ereg_sane %>% filter(Gene %in% tfs_dbd$Name)
  ereg_tftf = ereg_sane %>% filter(Gene %in% .$TF)

  list(
    ereg = ereg,
    ereg_sane = ereg_sane,
    ereg_tf = ereg_tf,
    ereg_tftf = ereg_tftf,
    gene_auc = gene_auc,
    region_auc = region_auc,
    group_df = group_df,
    labels_order = labels_order,
    config_name = config_name
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Load single config data when in test mode
if (test_mode) {
  cat("TEST MODE: Loading data from", test_config, "\n")
  test_data = load_single_config(test_config, scplus_dir, working_dir, obj, tfs_dbd)

  # Unpack for convenience - these variables are now available for testing
  ereg = test_data$ereg
  ereg_sane = test_data$ereg_sane
  ereg_tf = test_data$ereg_tf
  ereg_tftf = test_data$ereg_tftf
  gene_auc = test_data$gene_auc
  region_auc = test_data$region_auc
  group_df = test_data$group_df
  labels_order = test_data$labels_order

  # Create test output directory
  test_out_dir = file.path(out_dir_base, "test_plots")
  dir.create(test_out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  cat("Data loaded. Available variables:\n")
  cat("  ereg, ereg_sane, ereg_tf, ereg_tftf\n")
  cat("  gene_auc, region_auc, group_df, labels_order\n")
  cat("  test_out_dir:", test_out_dir, "\n")
  cat("\nExample usage:\n")
  cat("  plot_auc_heatmaps(gene_auc, obj_avg, '\\\\+\\\\/\\\\+', test_out_dir, 'test_pos', 'Greys')\n")
}
```

```{r}

if (test_mode) {
  
  #' Define expressed genes
  obj_avg_cur = obj_avg[,c("Glut-RA", "Glut-Arco-1", "GABA-1-1", "GABA-4-1")]
  
  plot(density(obj_avg_cur[, "Glut-RA"]))
  expr_thresh = 2
  
  genes_to_select = rownames(obj_avg_cur)[apply(obj_avg_cur, 1, function(x) any(x > expr_thresh))]
  length(genes_to_select)
  length(genes_to_select) / nrow(obj_avg_cur)
  
  tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+"
  #tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*"
  deg_cur = deg %>% filter(gene %in% genes_to_select)
  plot_deg_scatter(ereg, deg = deg_cur,
                   tf_name = "MAFB",
                   tf_pattern = tf_pattern,
                   out_dir = test_out_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"))
  
  plot_deg_density(ereg, deg = deg_cur,
                   tf_name = "MAFB",
                   tf_pattern = tf_pattern,
                   out_dir = test_out_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"))
  
  perm_result = permutation_test_deg(ereg, deg_cur, tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                                     tf_name = "MAFB", sets_deg = c("ra", "gaba4"),
                                     stat_fn = "mean_product", n_perm=1E5)
  perm_result
  
  perm_result = permutation_test_deg(ereg, deg_cur, tf_pattern = "MAFB_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                                     tf_name = "MAFB", sets_deg = c("astro", "gaba4"),
                                     stat_fn = "mean_product", n_perm=1E5)
  
  
  tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+"
  #tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*"
  plot_deg_scatter(ereg, deg = deg,
                   tf_name = "EMX2",
                   tf_pattern = tf_pattern,
                   out_dir = test_out_dir,
                   sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"))
  perm_result = permutation_test_deg(ereg, deg, tf_pattern = "EMX2_.*_\\+\\/\\+",
                                     tf_name = "EMX2", sets_deg = c("ra", "astro"),
                                     stat_fn = "mean_product")
  perm_result
  
  gene_auc_mean = calculate_gene_auc_mean(gene_auc, ereg_pattern = "\\+\\/\\+")
  gene_auc_spec = calculate_celltype_specificity(gene_auc_mean, method="zscore")
  gene_auc_spec_mat = gene_auc_spec %>% select(tf, cluster, specificity) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = "cluster", values_from="specificity") %>%
    column_to_rownames("tf") %>% as.matrix()
  
  mat = gene_auc_spec_mat
  palette = "Greys"
  colors = scales::brewer_pal(palette = palette, direction = 1)(9)
  cols = colorRamp2(breaks = seq(min(mat), max(mat), length.out=9), colors = colors)
  
  height = 10
  width = height * ncol(mat) / nrow(mat)
  hm = Heatmap(mat, cluster_columns = F, cluster_rows = T,
               show_row_names = T,
               #col = cols,
               row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6), column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
               height = unit(height, "in"), width = unit(width, "in"))
  hm
}
```



## Run analysis for all configs
```{r}
results = list()
if (!test_mode) {
  for (config_name in config_dirs) {
    results[[config_name]] = process_config(
      config_name = config_name,
      scplus_dir = scplus_dir,
      working_dir = working_dir,
      out_dir_base = out_dir_base,
      obj = obj,
      obj_avg = obj_avg,
      tfs_dbd = tfs_dbd,
      deg = deg,
      all_genes_id = all_genes_id,
      deg_color_limit = 5
    )
  }
}
```

## TF UMAPs (config-independent)
```{r}
# Collect all unique TFs across all configs
all_tfs = unique(unlist(lapply(results, function(x) {
  if (!is.null(x)) unique(x$ereg_sane$TF) else NULL
})))

cat("Generating TF UMAPs for", length(all_tfs), "TFs...\n")
umap_dir_tfs = file.path(out_dir_base, "tf_umaps")
plot_tf_umaps(obj, all_tfs, umap_dir_tfs)
```

## Summary
```{r}
cat("\n\nProcessing complete!\n")
cat("Configs processed:", paste(names(results[!sapply(results, is.null)]), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Output directory:", out_dir_base, "\n")
```
